title: Module 1
content:
Precision Farming — Concept and Applications - Role of electronics in
agricultural engineering for precision agriculture. Basics of precision
agriculture, tools for implementation of precision agriculture. Introduction of
GIS/GPS positioning system for precision farming. Use of GIS and GPS in
farm machinery and equipment. Precision farming concepts - Map based
system - Real time system – Combination Map and real time system -
components of PF – Site specific management - Constraints of PF.

title: Module 2
content:
Greenhouse—Concept, Classification and Uses - Greenhouse—Design and
Construction - Greenhouse Heating System - Greenhouse of Micro-climate -
Greenhouse—Growing Media - Polytunnels, Shade Nets, Plastic Nets and
Plastic Mulching - Greenhouse Irrigation Methods

title: Module 3
content:
Site-specific nutrient management- weeds management - Agro-chemicals and
fertilizer management, data sources and decision making for site-specific
management. Grain quality and yield. Yield monitoring and mapping, soil
sampling and analysis.

title: Module 4
content:
Design of Drip and Micro-Sprinkler Irrigation Systems - Fertigation of
Greenhouse Crops - Water Quality—Greenhouse Use - Greenhouse—Insect
Pests and Disease Management
